risk_title: State-level governance fragility affecting project implementation capacity
risk_summary: Wide disparity in state performance across 19 participating states, with 5 states (Ebonyi, Ekiti, Kogi, Osun, Oyo) unable to award any civil works contracts, suggesting governance capacity constraints or political barriers to implementation at subnational level.
evidence_quote: There is a wide disparity in performance and awards across the 19 participating states. Ebonyi, Ekiti, Kogi, Osun, and Oyo are yet to award any civil works contracts

risk_title: Slow sector reform operationalization across states
risk_summary: Only 2 out of 19 states have fully operationalized required road sector reforms (RARA and SRF), indicating potential political resistance or governance fragility in implementing structural reforms necessary for project success.
evidence_quote: Two out of the 19 participating states have fully operationalized the RARA and SRF, i.e., passing the bill into law and receiving the governor's ascent.
